metadata.title: The Spinning Compass Inside Every MRI
metadata.color_semantics: TEAL = the fixed z-component (what the MRI scanner reads); CRIMSON = the precessing azimuthal motion (the frequency the scanner listens for)
metadata.note: Exclusions honored: no Hamiltonian diagonalization, no g-factor/QED aside, no pulse-sequence engineering. Mechanism only: spin in z-field keeps polar angle fixed while azimuth advances at Larmor frequency omega=gamma*B.
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file

beats.label: This is Liam, in for Bear. Every MRI scanner works by listening. Millions of proton spins inside you
